## Meeting Purpose

[Review client project status and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**LightSource:** We will decline to stage articles after two revision rounds, citing our limited Framer access as the reason. Sydney will manage the client comms.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [**Read AI:** The client is struggling to review assignments. Aida will create a hub-and-spoke keyword map for clarity and reschedule the sync to Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [**Fleet:** Brock approved assignments, unblocking 5 new blogs. He provided no content feedback, but looped in a new marketing team member for an SEO review.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**Enable:** The Product Feature Matrix is being built out. Aida will share the COVID data protection overview and discuss Airtable access with the client today.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

## Topics

### LightSource

  - [**Problem:** The client (Ben) is requesting revisions beyond the two-round limit, including complex, specific images.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [**Decision:** Decline staging articles to enforce the revision policy.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
      - [**Rationale:** We have completed two revision rounds.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
      - [**Action:** Sydney will accept simple edits but decline major changes.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [**Client Comms:** Sydney will draft a message for Andi's approval.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
      - [**Reason:** Cite limited Framer access as the reason we cannot stage the content.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
  - [**Image Creation:** The current 15-minute per-image process is not scalable. Sydney will create some images but not all.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)

### Read AI

  - [**Problem:** The client is struggling to review assignments in the Content OS, causing syncs to be unproductive.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [**Solution:** Aida will create a hub-and-spoke keyword map to provide a clear, structured view of the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [**Calibration:** Becerra will assist with the calibration article, which is due by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Purpose:** To align on voice and tone, not strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**Sync:** The weekly sync will be rescheduled to Monday, as the client is out on Tuesday.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)

### Enable

  - [**Product Feature Matrix:** Aida is building the matrix in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
      - [**Status:** COVID data protection overview is complete (generated from client PDFs).](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
      - [**Next:** Add the two other products after their PMMs provide input.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [**Airtable Access:** Aida will discuss access needs with the client today.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
      - [**Potential Editors:** Elaine (marketing) for general content; Stuti (VP of Products) for strategic guidance.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [**Agentec Pipeline:** Gabrielle will set up the pipeline using Hassan's walkthrough video.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)

### Fleet

  - [**Assignments:** Brock approved assignments, unblocking work.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**Content:** Brock provided no feedback on delivered content.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)

      - [**Significance:** This individual may take over as the primary client contact.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)

### Bubble

### SpectraOps

  - [**Feedback:** The PMM provided helpful feedback on two articles.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [**Process:** Aida will intervene if a PMM's edits compromise a post's SEO structure.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)

### Field Guide

  - [**Content:** Two blogs are nearly ready; Gabrielle is completing final edits.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [**Client Feedback:** The client is very happy with the first two published blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [**SEO Issue:** Google Search Console shows an AMP page indexing error. Aida will flag this to the client.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [**Calibration:** Kavishka is editing the calibration article, due tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

### Redis

  - [**Calibration:** Kavishka is starting the calibration article today.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [**Content Audit:** The audit is due today.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [**Review:** Sydney will review the calibration article with Gabrielle before tomorrow's sync.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)

### AirBite

  - [**Content OS:** Aida set up the Content OS with 40+ assignments for today's call.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [**Thought Leadership:** Erik is pushing for more client feedback to ensure alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)

### Vizcom

  - [**Strategy:** The client is aligned; minor feedback was provided on cluster topics.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Keyword Research:** Becerra will start research, using the strategy doc as a base and the meeting transcript for client suggestions.](https://fathom.video/share/syxjdqHcA-iCKRYZiSh5GJnft5v7e1t3?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
